---
hub_index: false
title: "Class vs SKOS Concept: Decision Tree"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

The FADS site no longer keeps a local modeling decision tree.

Use the canonical ontology contributor docs instead:

- Conventions: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/CONVENTIONS.md>
- Formal ontology docs: <https://w3id.org/gcdfo/salmon>
- Term requests: <https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/dfo-salmon-ontology/blob/main/docs/SUBMIT_REQUESTS_README.md>

For package-side term lookup and reuse, use:

- <https://dfo-pacific-science.github.io/metasalmon/articles/reusing-standards-salmon-data-terms.html>
